title: Algerian Pappardelle Delight
description: A unique fusion of Algerian spices and traditional Italian pasta. The delicate flavors of this dish will impress your guests.

ingredients.name: Algerian Delicate Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Combine cumin, coriander, paprika, and cayenne pepper

instructions: Cook the Pappardelle Pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the Algerian Delicate Spice Blend and stir for 1 minute.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to release their juices.
Add the cooked Pappardelle Pasta to the skillet and toss with the tomato mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
